analyst_note: Main claim: "The ambition is to achieve net zero scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by 2027" (annual-and-sustainability-report-2025.pdf, p18). SBTi: Targets set, 1.5°C near-term target (2030). 8-Test: 0 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 0 MISSING -> PASS. Strong climate disclosure — near-dated net-zero (Scope 1+2 by 2027), explicit 2020 baseline, SBTi-approved targets, full scope coverage. One MED: emissions-data assurance level not crisply evidenced in the extract.
